zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby於1062年7月9日出生在英國德比夏爾時，他的父親Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday26歲，母親Bertha18歲。他和Hawise de Vitré至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1139年6月1日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈特利享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾圖特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby于1062年7月9日出生在英国德比夏爾时，他的父亲Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday26岁，母亲Bertha18岁。他和Hawise de Vitré至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1139年6月1日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾哈特利享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾圖特波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby was born on 9 July 1062, in Derbyshire, England, his father, Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday, was 26 and his mother, Bertha, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Hawise de Vitré. He died on 1 June 1139, in Chatterley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby est né le 9 juillet 1062, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Bertha, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Hawise de Vitré. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1139, à Chatterley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby am 9. Juli 1062 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday 26 und seine Mutter Bertha 18. Er hatte mit Hawise de Vitré mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juni 1139 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Chatterley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby è nato il il 9 luglio 1062 nel Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Bertha, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Hawise de Vitré. Morì il 1 giugno 1139, nel Chatterley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derbyが1062年7月9日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesdayは26歳，母Berthaは18歳であった。彼はHawise de Vitréとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1139年6月1日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャッテルリーで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby(이)가 1062년 7월 9일 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Hawise de Vitré(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1139년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 채털리에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.9 July 1062–1 Jun 1139: 9 de julho de 1062–1 de junho de 1139
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby nasceu em 9 de julho de 1062, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Bertha, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Hawise de Vitré. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1139, em Chatterley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby родился 9 июля 1062 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Hawise de Vitré. Он умер 1 июня 1139 г. в местности чаттирли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.9 July 1062–1 Jun 1139: 9 de julio de 1062–1 de junio de 1139
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby nació el 9 de julio de 1062, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Bertha, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Hawise de Vitré. Murió el 1 de junio de 1139, en Chatterley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
